message:
feat(sandbox): complete module setup for security sandbox

Configure all metal0 dependencies for HTTP/2 + TLS 1.3 support:
- hashmap_helper, allocator_helper (utilities)
- gzip (compression with libdeflate)
- green_thread (goroutine-style concurrency)
- netpoller (epoll/kqueue async I/O)
- h2 (HTTP/2 client)

Sandbox now builds successfully with full security features:
- Controlled HTTP (host-mediated requests)
- Restricted crypto (randomness only)
- CPU/gas metering
- Virtual filesystem
